name: jira-testplan-generator
description: BLAST Framework — Jira Test Plan Generator (React + Express + GROQ)

scripts.install:all: cd tools && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,UI" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan" "cd tools && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "API,UI" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan" "cd tools && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
